entities.name: Webhook
entities.context: External integration that pushes meeting data into the system

entities.name: Inbox
entities.context: Folder that receives raw meeting files (transcripts, audio, metadata) from webhook

entities.name: Meeting Ingestion System
entities.context: System that processes meetings through webhook input and state-based workflow

relationships.context: Webhook deposits raw meeting files into Inbox folder
System receives meeting data via external webhook
Inbox serves as input staging area for meeting processing
